long_description:
namespace=19066a3fe4ca466a810f7278fc902dc9 instanceID=02b7_91504a93-b490-4758-b878-f6ad29fb53c3

VSI will not restart after 10 minutes. Unknown reason.
This is for planned maintenance and we expect the VM to run again.  Please help get the VM running.
Incident source: CHG14251192 - Charles Lefurgy
close_notes:
(All Timestamps must be in UTC)
Issue Summary:VM will not restart after maintenance
SME Findings: sme-team: SME Findings
Reason of Escalation:
Resolution Steps:
Signature of Issue:provisioning_timeout
Jira/Github/Other Tickets:
Category/Subcategory:
Timeline Summary:
* We have 5 VSIs(3 Internal/2 External(IKS account)) failing to go in RUNNING state due to Waiting for vdisk .
CORE team performed STOP/START for the VSIs but still seeing same issue once we try to start the VSI.
CORE team performed STOP/START for the VSIs but still seeing same issue once we try to start the VSI.
We have storage-sre and CSRE team checking and while checking logs we found error Volume encryption key state is not active on volume So team is checking if they can find more details from logs.
from icl we found Error occurred while unwrapping wdek
Kaustubh and Kanhaiya joined from kp team.
Requested to check if kp instance is existed or not.
Case CS4424756 has been created for customer to check. 
* 02b7_5c9dc8d0-4335-4367-ae83-8a556f1f2a1f 19066a3fe4ca466a810f7278fc902dc9 
* 02b7_91504a93-b490-4758-b878-f6ad29fb53c3 19066a3fe4ca466a810f7278fc902dc9
* 02b7_aac93110-5cab-4d19-a864-44b81cb8041d 19066a3fe4ca466a810f7278fc902dc9
Resolution Runbook: Not Needed / Not Available / URL
